message:
Migrate hash comparisons to constant-time equality across 14 modules

Replace direct string/byte equality (!=) with ct_eq() / ct_eq_bytes()
from crate::security::constant_time for all hash comparisons that
could be timing-oracle targets. This hardens against timing side-channel
attacks on security-critical comparison paths.

Affected modules and their comparison sites:

- artifact_persistence.rs: payload_hash verification on replay
- policy_checkpoint.rs: parent_hash chain validation
- snapshot_policy.rs: root_hash chain head verification
- fork_detection.rs: parent_state_hash chain validation
- witness_ref.rs: integrity_hash content verification (byte comparison)
- mitigation_synthesis.rs: trace_hash integrity validation
- idempotency_store.rs: payload_hash deduplication comparison
- decision_receipt.rs: previous_receipt_hash chain validation and
  chain_hash verification (both sites)
- barrier_primitives.rs: fork-pin hash verification
- retrievability_gate.rs: hash comparison in retrieval checks
- artifact_signing.rs: signature hash comparison
- category_shift.rs: category hash comparison
- proof_service.rs: proof hash verification
- receipt_chain.rs: receipt chain hash comparison

Also rename search_token → search_term in main.rs for clarity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
